mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_member (userid, userpw, nickname, social_type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userPw}, #{nickname}, 'LOCAL')
mapper.select: SELECT m.userid, m.userpw, m.userName, m.nickname, m.enabled, m.user_img, m.job, m.bio, m.link1, m.link2, m.link3, m.ad_agree, m.push_agree, a.auth FROM tbl_member m LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_member_auth a ON m.userid = a.userid WHERE m.userid = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMBER SET USER_IMG = #{userImg}, UPDATEDATE = SYSDATE WHERE USERID = #{userId}

UPDATE tbl_member SET userName = #{userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nickname = #{nickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job = #{job, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bio = #{bio, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_img = #{userImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, link1 = #{link1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, link2 = #{link2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, link3 = #{link3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ad_agree = #{adAgree, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, push_agree = #{pushAgree, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updatedate = SYSDATE WHERE userid = #{userId}
